objective: Maximize Delivery Quality and Client Satisfaction Through AI-Driven Proactive Quality Assurance

krs.label: Early Detection Rate
krs.description: Red projects predicted >30 days before status change

krs.label: G2G Recovery Rate
krs.description: Get-to-Green plans returning to Green within 60 days

krs.label: Portfolio Health
krs.description: Active projects maintaining Green status (22 of 30 projects)

krs.label: Review Prep Time
krs.description: Average time to prepare regional health review materials

krs.label: Knowledge Reuse
krs.description: New projects receiving relevant lessons-learned at kickoff

krs.label: Client NPS Delta
krs.description: NPS improvement for projects using client-facing QA agent

alert_tiers.label: Watch
alert_tiers.description: PM and Delivery Lead notified. Acknowledge, update RAID log, address flags.

alert_tiers.label: Caution
alert_tiers.description: QA Director reviews within 48 hours and decides on intervention.

alert_tiers.label: Critical
alert_tiers.description: Executive notification with AI-generated risk brief. Review within 1 week.
